languages.text: "Так все. Полк-то штрафной". {n}Сержант пожимает плечами.{/n} "Но знаете, солдаты из нас — что надо. Не из всех подчистую выбьешь старые привычки: нет-нет да стащат палочку {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}лхо{/g}, ну и что ж теперь? Зато стерпят все: голод, холод, ранения. Телом своим пробоину в борту законопатят, коли понадобится".

traits.locale_text: "Так все. Полк-то штрафной". {n}Сержант пожимает плечами.{/n} "Но знаете, солдаты из нас — что надо. Не из всех подчистую выбьешь старые привычки: нет-нет да стащат палочку {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}лхо{/g}, ну и что ж теперь? Зато стерпят все: голод, холод, ранения. Телом своим пробоину в борту законопатят, коли понадобится".

languages.text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

Телом своим пробоину в борту законопатят, коли понадобится".

Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

languages.text: “没错，是判罪军团。”{n}军士耸耸肩。{/n}“不过说真的，我们这帮兵打起仗来绝对没得挑。当然，有些坏习惯改不了。时不时就会有人偷根{g|Encyclopedia:Lho}麻烟{/g}，不过那又怎样？他们什么苦都扛得住，饥饿、寒冷、伤病。必要的时候，他们还会用自己的身体堵住防御缺口。”
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

traits.locale_text: “没错，是判罪军团。”{n}军士耸耸肩。{/n}“不过说真的，我们这帮兵打起仗来绝对没得挑。当然，有些坏习惯改不了。时不时就会有人偷根{g|Encyclopedia:Lho}麻烟{/g}，不过那又怎样？他们什么苦都扛得住，饥饿、寒冷、伤病。必要的时候，他们还会用自己的身体堵住防御缺口。”

languages.text: « Oui, c'est un régiment pénal, {n}répond le sergent en haussant les épaules.{/n} Mais je peux vous dire qu'on fait quand même d'excellents soldats. Évidemment, la discipline ne suffit pas toujours à faire passer les mauvaises habitudes. De temps en temps, il y en a un qui fauche un {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}cigalho{/g}, mais qu'est-ce que ça peut faire ? À côté de ça, ils sont capables de tout endurer : la faim, le froid, les blessures. Ils seraient prêts à colmater une brèche avec leurs propres corps s'il le fallait. »
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, c'est un régiment pénal, {n}répond le sergent en haussant les épaules.{/n} Mais je peux vous dire qu'on fait quand même d'excellents soldats. Évidemment, la discipline ne suffit pas toujours à faire passer les mauvaises habitudes. De temps en temps, il y en a un qui fauche un {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}cigalho{/g}, mais qu'est-ce que ça peut faire ? À côté de ça, ils sont capables de tout endurer : la faim, le froid, les blessures. Ils seraient prêts à colmater une brèche avec leurs propres corps s'il le fallait. »

languages.text: "Doğru. Bu bir ceza infaz alayı." {n}Çavuş omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Fakat bildiğiniz üzere bizden çok iyi asker çıkar. Tabii herkes eski alışkanlıkları geride bırakamayabiliyor. Arada bir {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}liho{/g} dalı araklıyorlarsa ne olmuş? Her şeye dayanırlar; açlığa, soğuğa, yaralanmalara... Mevzileri ayakta kalsın diye can verir, gedikleri kendi cesetleriyle kapatırlar."
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

traits.locale_text: "Doğru. Bu bir ceza infaz alayı." {n}Çavuş omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Fakat bildiğiniz üzere bizden çok iyi asker çıkar. Tabii herkes eski alışkanlıkları geride bırakamayabiliyor. Arada bir {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}liho{/g} dalı araklıyorlarsa ne olmuş? Her şeye dayanırlar; açlığa, soğuğa, yaralanmalara... Mevzileri ayakta kalsın diye can verir, gedikleri kendi cesetleriyle kapatırlar."

languages.text: «Eso es. Es un regimiento penal». {n}El sargento se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Pero bueno, como soldados funcionamos muy bien. Por supuesto, no se les pueden quitar las costumbres a todos: de vez en cuando, alguno roba unos cigarrillos de {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}, pero ¿qué más da? Soportan cualquier cosa: hambre, frío heridas... Cubrirán una brecha con su propio cuerpo si es necesario».
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

traits.locale_text: «Eso es. Es un regimiento penal». {n}El sargento se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Pero bueno, como soldados funcionamos muy bien. Por supuesto, no se les pueden quitar las costumbres a todos: de vez en cuando, alguno roba unos cigarrillos de {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}, pero ¿qué más da? Soportan cualquier cosa: hambre, frío heridas... Cubrirán una brecha con su propio cuerpo si es necesario».

languages.text: "Das stimmt. Wir sind ein Strafregiment:" {n}Der Sergeant zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Aber Ihr wisst, dass wir verdammt gute Soldaten sind. Ihr könnt ihnen natürlich nicht alle alten Gewohnheiten austreiben: Ab und an gönnen Sie sich einen {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}Lho{/g}-Stab, und wenn schon? Dafür ertragen sie alles: Hunger, Kälte, Verletzungen. Sie schließen eine Bresche mit ihren eigenen Körpern, wenn nötig."
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."

traits.locale_text: "Das stimmt. Wir sind ein Strafregiment:" {n}Der Sergeant zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Aber Ihr wisst, dass wir verdammt gute Soldaten sind. Ihr könnt ihnen natürlich nicht alle alten Gewohnheiten austreiben: Ab und an gönnen Sie sich einen {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}Lho{/g}-Stab, und wenn schon? Dafür ertragen sie alles: Hunger, Kälte, Verletzungen. Sie schließen eine Bresche mit ihren eigenen Körpern, wenn nötig."

languages.text: 「そうだよ。罰の連隊だ。 」{n}軍曹は肩をすくめた。{/n}「でも、いい兵士になるよ。もちろん、悪い癖は全部直せない。たまには、{g|Encyclopedia:Lho}リョウ{/g}の棒を盗むこともある。でも、どんな苦しみも耐える。飢え、寒さ、怪我。必要なら、自分の体で穴を塞ぐ。」
languages.original_text: "That's right. It's a penal regiment." {n}The sergeant shrugs.{/n} "But you know, we make for damned good soldiers. Of course, you can't beat old habits out of all of them: once in a while, they'll swipe a {g|Encyclopedia:Lho}lho{/g}-stick, and what of it? But they'll endure anything: hunger, cold, injuries. They'll plug a breach with their own bodies if needed."
